Sport

Don't fade.

What separates holding the level from dropping off - late in a game, deep into a season. A growing number of elite teams now build it with hyperbaric oxygen, at the dose the research uses.

What the research shows Talk to us
NFL·NHL·NBA·Football·Rugby·Cycling·Athletics
Already in the building

From the lab into elite sport.

Hyperbaric oxygen has moved out of the clinic and into the top of the game. The same HPO.TECH chambers now sit in recovery centres across the highest levels of sport.

The Apex
Built for altitude and the extremes
What the research shows

Built for stamina, where it's measured.

In a blinded, placebo-controlled trial, trained athletes gained VO₂ max and raised their anaerobic threshold against placebo - with more mitochondria and stronger mitochondrial respiration, measured from muscle biopsy. The plain version: the same effort, further below the limit - and banked without adding training load.

See the full science →
In the trial — HBOT vs placebo
HBOTPlacebo
VO₂ max also rose significantly versus placebo. Hadanny et al., 2022 · 40 sessions at 2.0 ATA, trained athletes.
The experience

Sit up, not shut in.

Most hyperbaric chambers used in sport are a soft tube you lie inside. Ours are a cabin you sit up in - windows and daylight, a reclining seat, and an hour that passes the way a good flight does. That's the difference between a chamber a squad dreads and one they actually use. With recovery, adherence is everything.

Windows & daylight

Huge windows and see-through doors - none of the shut-in feeling of a soft tube.

Climate controlled

A built-in air cooler and air dryer keep the cabin fresh and dry, session after session.

Screens & tablets

Integrated screens and tablets that mirror your phone - watch, scroll or catch up while you go.

Reclining seats

Sit up and settle back. Work, talk or rest through the session - you're not lying flat for an hour.

Why Thrive

We run one. That's the difference.

Thrive operates a working hyperbaric clinic in Bath and partners on protocol with elite sports team Bath Rugby. So when you contact us, you reach someone who runs these chambers day in, day out - not a reseller. We've sat in the seat, built the protocols, and learned what a serious performance setup actually needs before it's installed.

Talk it through →
The chambers

From single-seat to full squad.

Zeugma
Atlantis
Mediterranean

Cleared for medical use across the Gulf

Every HPO.TECH system holds full marketing authorisation from the Saudi Food & Drug Authority (SFDA) and is registered with the UAE Ministry of Health and Prevention (MOHAP).
